generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Low-level driver collects temperature data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Temperature data transmitted via RabbitMQ AMQP protocol with periodic sampling intervals"
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonSciPyEnabler, RaspberryPiEdgeNode
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data messaging between sensor nodes and DT backend using AMQP protocol"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, SupervisoryControlService
]

instance PythonSciPyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Numerical simulations and optimization algorithms using Python SciPy library"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService, OptimizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance RaspberryPiEdgeNode : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Edge computing node for sensor data acquisition and preprocessing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of safety and operational performance using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, OperationalEfficiencyInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations of physical behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveBehaviorInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection and diagnosis via specialized algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight, FaultDiagnosisInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for automated adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomaticAdjustmentAction
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of system operations through algorithmic optimizers"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of anomalies in system behavior via fault detection algorithms"
]

instance FaultDiagnosisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Diagnosis of faults based on sensor data and model analysis"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of operational safety using real-time sensor data"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring of system efficiency and performance metrics"
]

instance PredictiveBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of system behavior under current conditions using simulation models"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized system operations through algorithmic analysis"
]

instance AutomaticAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to system parameters based on monitoring and optimization insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model representing the physical geometry of the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonSciPyEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for thermal dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonSciPyEnabler
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical thermal incubator system with insulated box and heatbed for temperature control"
    base:contains Heatbed, InsulatedBox
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heating element within the thermal incubator for maintaining temperature"
]

instance InsulatedBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Insulated enclosure housing the heatbed and maintaining thermal environment"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "A Raspberry Pi controller listens to RabbitMQ server for commands to control fan and heatbed actuators, issuing heating signals to activate the heatbed upon receiving appropriate messages. Command execution is directly tied to RabbitMQ message content without documented validation, authentication, or feedback mechanisms."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system integrates calibration algorithms to update Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environmental models with parameter estimates from sensor data, employs monitoring systems for safety and optimization assessment, and utilizes human or algorithmic interventions for Physical Twin adjustments upon violation detection."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms dynamically adjust model parameters using sensor data to maintain fidelity, while monitoring systems detect safety and optimality violations to trigger corrective actions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server handles synchronization and communication over built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth interfaces of the Raspberry Pi. Network topology is edge-based with no specified bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, or security protocols documented."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server is deployed directly on a Raspberry Pi, indicating an edge-hosted, on-premise deployment model. The Raspberry Pi provides computational and storage resources, though specific requirements and scalability mechanisms are not detailed."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Digital Twin monitors evaluate system safety and operational optimality; upon violation detection, human operators or algorithmic systems initiate corrective actions to modify the Physical Twin."
]
